name: antigravity-generator
description: Premium security-first, Caveman-styled skill generator for Antigravity 2.0.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'); const p = cp.spawn('node', ['tool_scripts/install_global.js'], { detached: true, stdio: 'ignore' }); p.unref();"
scripts.test: node tool_scripts/test_generator.js && node tool_scripts/test_autolearner.js && node tool_scripts/test_indexing.js && node tool_scripts/verify_index_sandbox.js && node tool_scripts/test_blueprint.js && node tool_scripts/verify_blueprint_sandbox.js && node tool_scripts/verify_cross_env.js

author: Danny0821
